Product families

Hardware built to outlast the deployment.

Three connected layers — from the backbone network to the field edge — engineered to the same standard of reliability.

Network Infrastructure

Managed and unmanaged industrial Ethernet switches, secure routers, and wireless — the resilient backbone with millisecond ring recovery.

Explore infrastructure →

Edge Connectivity

Protocol gateways, serial servers, and remote I/O that bring legacy field devices onto modern networks.

Explore connectivity →

Industrial Computing

Rugged, fanless edge computers and panels that run analytics and control where the work happens.

Explore computing →
Where Moxa runs

Trusted where downtime isn't an option.

From the factory floor to the trackside cabinet, the same connective reliability carries across every environment.

Manufacturing

Smart Manufacturing

Deterministic networks connecting machines, robots, and lines with zero-loss redundancy.

Energy

Power & Energy

Substation-hardened gear for smart grids, renewables, and mission-critical distribution.

Transportation

Rail, Marine & Transport

EN 50155 and shock-rated connectivity that keeps moving assets online in motion.

Why Moxa

The bond behind the network.

The Moxa Triangle marks a three-way bond — Moxa, our partners, and our customers. Everything we engineer is built to keep that connection dependable for the long run.

Field-proven reliability

Products validated in the harshest industrial conditions and deployed for decades.

Global service network

Local engineering support across 80+ countries, wherever your sites operate.

30+ years of focus

Three decades dedicated to one thing: industrial connectivity done right.

Sincere service

A partnership that starts at spec and continues through the full product life.

Let's connect

Talk to an engineer who knows your application.

Tell us the problem and we'll bring the right people and parts. No queues, no scripts — just sincere engineering support.
